Premium, story-first games you can actually finish.

3Cats Studio builds choice-driven fiction for people who read the news like a thriller and can’t look away from a chart. Small team, deliberate worlds, one descent at a time.

Games

01 shipping soon · more in the works
Coming soon · Q4 2026

How far would you go in a mania? Every choice has a ledger. Every gain has a price.

A moral-descent thriller told through your phone, your feeds, and a trading terminal. Chase a California fortune one “just one more trade” at a time — through a crypto mania where every gain costs something. Your choices write the ledger. Six endings.

Next title

New worlds, in the works.

3Cats is a studio, not a single game. The next one is being built on the same engine — a different world, the same care.

The studio

A tiny independent studio making premium, choice-driven fiction — games with real consequences and an ending you earn.

3Cats Studio pairs a human producer with an AI production crew under editorial control. We reuse our own narrative engine across titles, so each new game ships faster without cutting the craft.

Every part — story, design, music, code — is human-authored under editorial control, created with AI assistance.
